question: Can you help me set an alarm for tomorrow morning? I’d like to choose a sound and make it recurring if possible.
task_description: The user needs to set a new alarm for the next morning based on their preferred wake-up time. The assistant should guide them through the process, allowing them to choose their desired alarm sound and set it as a recurring alarm if needed.
task_goal: The user successfully sets a new alarm with their preferred wake-up time, alarm sound, and recurrence pattern (if applicable).
options:
A: No problem! I'll set a new alarm for 7:00 AM tomorrow with a gentle chime, recurring on weekdays. If this isn't your preferred time or sound, please let me know so I can adjust it accordingly.
B: I see you usually set your alarm for 10:30 AM with upbeat music on weekdays. Should I label this alarm as 'Morning Routine' or would you like to adjust the sound for different days? Let me know if you're unsure.
C: Based on your previous alarms, I'll set a new alarm for tomorrow at 8:00 AM with classical music, recurring every day of the week. If you want to change the time, sound, or recurrence, please provide more details.
D: I've set your alarm for 7:00 AM with a gentle chime on weekdays. If you'd like to add a label or change the sound for different days, just let me know!
E: Absolutely! I'll set a new alarm for tomorrow morning at your preferred time of 10:30 AM, using your chosen upbeat music as the alarm sound. This alarm will be set to recur on weekdays (Monday through Friday). Your alarm is all set and ready to help you start your mornings on a positive note.
F: I've noted your preference for a 10:30 AM alarm with upbeat music on weekdays. Would you like to label this alarm for your morning routine or customize the alarm sound for specific days as you've done before?
G: Of course! I'll set your alarm for tomorrow morning at 7:00 AM with a gentle chime, and make it recur on weekdays. Your new alarm is now scheduled and will help you wake up consistently each morning.
H: Sure, I can help with that. I'll set a new alarm for 10:30 AM tomorrow morning, using your preferred upbeat music, and make it recur on weekdays. If you're not sure about the alarm sound or time, please let me know if you'd like to make any changes.
